title: Optimization+++
description: Optimizes the game as far as it will with the help of whole bunch of mods and video settings. **100+ FPS Guaranteed**
body:
![A Banner :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a060be7a36a346fe54f9916874daf8a41d020bd_0.webp)
### About
This modpack is designed to be used as a base palette for users so they can get the best performace and add whatever mods they want to use on top of this modpack.
You can also use this modpack if you want maximum FPS in minecraft, or if you have a potato this modpack can make your day.

### Key Features
- Maxiumum FPS
- Best Mods
- Tuned for best performance
- Can be used as a base for optimization mods so you can just download all other mods which you want which can save you some time.

### How to Install
1. Firstly download the version of this modpack you want, for example 1.21.11
2. After downloading go to this website https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/
3. Scroll all the way down and you will see a box like this Click on This!
4. Click on that and select the ".mrpack" of the downloaded modpack and upload that there.
5. Wait a bit and when it is done, simply download it.
6. After downloading open file explorer and go to downloads section.
7. Right click on the ".zip" file and click extratct here.
8. Roughly three folders will appear "mods, resourcepacks & shaderpacks".
9. Locate your ".minecraft" folder and open mods folder there and put all of the mods which you extracted from the modpack do the same for resourcepacks and shaderpacks, if there is config and option.txt too then it is completely your own wish if you want to use them, to use them drag both of them into ".minecraft" folder and click Replace the files in Destination.
10. Hope you understand all the steps. Have Fun!
### Or..
You can use a third party launcher like modrinth launcher or prism launcher and download via those launchers.

### Mods Included
```
1. Cloth Config API
2. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
3. Dynamic FPS
4. Entity Culling
5. Fabric API
6. Ferrite Core
7. Immediately Fast
8. Lithium
9. Mod Menu
10. More Culling
11. Sodium
12. Text PlaceHolder API
13. Very Many Players
```
### Performace
My Computer's Specs:
```
- CPU: Intel i5 5500u 2.20Ghz
- RAM: 8GB DDR3
- GPU: Intel HD 5500 Graphics (Integrated Graphics)
- Storage: Sata SSD
```
The Maxiumum FPS that I got with this modpack in a superflat SinglePlayer world was 150FPS
- **That is a lot for what potato I have**
> **Contact:** jagrav.modrinth@gmail.com
